basic_details.job_title: JPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 90 Posts
basic_details.department: Health, Medical Education and Family Welfare Department, Jharkhand
basic_details.short_information: JPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 official notification has been released for 90 Assistant Professor posts in Super Speciality Departments under the Health, Medical Education and Family Welfare Department, Jharkhand. The online application process starts on 28 April 2026, and the last date to apply is 12 May 2026. In this article, you’ll find the JPSC Assistant Professor Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form.

application_fee.details: Fee can be paid online via Credit Card / Debit Card / Net Banking / UPI etc. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum 30 years, Maximum as per category (as on 01 August 2025)
age_limit.details: The age limit to apply for JPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 is 30 to 50 years. The cutoff date for determining the age limit is 01 August 2025. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved category candidates as per government rules. | Note: Age is calculated as on 01 August 2025. Minimum age is 30 years for all categories.

qualification.education_qualification: Department-specific D.M./M.Ch./DNB/DrNB as prescribed by National Medical Commission (NMC) + Basic Course in Biomedical Research from a recognised institution
qualification.details: Educational Qualification (Mandatory): Candidates must possess the department-specific super-speciality qualification as per National Medical Commission (Medical Institutions (Qualifications of Faculty) Regulation, 2025): | Additional Mandatory: Completion of Basic Course in Biomedical Research from a recognised medical institution designated by the Commission. | Domicile / Residence Requirement (Mandatory for Reservation): Reservation benefits are available only to permanent residents of Jharkhand State. | Nationality: The candidate must be a citizen of India.

vacancy_details.Department Name: Plastic and Reconstruction surgery and Burn Unit Deptt.

selection_process: The selection for JPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 will be based on the following:
Merit List: Final selection will be made on the basis of Interview. Marks will be awarded for academic qualifications
publications and interview as per rules prescribed in Jharkhand Medical Education Service (Appointment
Document Verification: Candidates shortlisted for interview must produce all original documents for verification.
Medical Examination: Selected candidates must undergo medical examination as per rules.
how_to_apply: Visit the Official JPSC Website:
Go to the official JPSC website: www.jpsc.gov.in.
One-Time Registration (OTR):
Before applying, candidates need to complete the One-Time Registration (OTR) process on the JPSC portal.
You will need to provide your email ID, mobile number, and other basic details to complete the registration.
Fill the Application Form:
After successful registration, log in to the portal using your credentials.
Fill out the online application form for the Assistant Professor recruitment, ensuring that all information is correct and accurate.
Upload Documents:
Upload scanned copies of your educational qualifications, experience certificates, and other required documents.
Ensure that the files are in the prescribed format and size.
Pay the Application Fee:
Candidates are required to pay the application fee online via Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking.
The application fee is ₹600 for General/EWS candidates and ₹150 for ST/SC/PwD candidates.
Submit the Application:
Review all details entered in the application form.
Submit the application form once you are sure all information is accurate.
Take a printout of the filled-in application form for future reference.
Important Dates for JPSC Recruitment:
Start Date for Online Application: 16-04-2026
Last Date for Online Application: 06-05-2026
important_instructions: Candidates must possess all required educational qualifications and certificates by the last date of online application. Certificates issued after the last date will not be accepted.
Reservation benefits are available only to permanent residents of Jharkhand. Candidates must mention their category correctly in the online application; no change will be allowed later.

The Commission's decision regarding eligibility, qualification and candidature of candidates will be final. All information related to the selection will be published on the Commission's website www.jpsc.gov.in only; candidates must regularly check the website.
Candidates spreading misleading information or using unfair means will face action under Jharkhand Competitive Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means in Recruitment) Act-2023.
Candidates can contact the Commission for technical issues via helpline numbers or email mentioned in the advertisement.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in JPSC Assistant Professor Super Speciality Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: JPSC has notified 90 Assistant Professor (Super Speciality) vacancies in departments like Nephrology, Cardiology, Neurology, Neurosurgery, Surgical Gastroenterology, Urology, CTVS, Plastic & Reconstruction Surgery, and Medical/Surgical Oncology.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for JPSC Assistant Professor (Super Speciality) 2026?
faq.answer: The online application starts on 28 April 2026 and the last date to apply is 12 May 2026 (5:00 PM); fee payment is allowed till 14 May 2026, and hard copies must reach JPSC by 25 May 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for JPSC Assistant Professor Super Speciality posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have the relevant D.M./M.Ch./DNB/DrNB in the concerned super‑speciality as per NMC Faculty Regulations 2025, along with completion of the Basic Course in Biomedical Research from a recognised institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for JPSC Assistant Professor (Super Speciality) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must be at least 30 years old and not exceed the category‑wise maximum age as on 01 August 2025: UR/EWS – 45 years; BC‑I/BC‑II – 47 years; SC/ST – 50 years; Female (UR/BC‑I/BC‑II) – 48 years, with PwD getting 10 years relaxation over the category limit and no upper age bar for State Government employees.

faq.question: Q5. What is the pay scale for JPSC Assistant Professor (Super Speciality) posts?
faq.answer: The post carries Pay Band ₹15,600–39,100 with Grade Pay ₹6,600, corresponding to Level‑11 in the 7th CPC pay matrix, along with usual state government allowances as per Jharkhand rules.

faq.question: Q6. Is Jharkhand domicile mandatory for reservation in JPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, reservation benefits are available only to permanent residents of Jharkhand, so candidates claiming SC/ST/OBC/EWS or other state quota must possess a valid Jharkhand domicile certificate; others will be treated as unreserved.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for JPSC Assistant Professor (Super Speciality) 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on interview‑based merit, where marks are awarded for academic record, super‑speciality degree, additional qualifications (Ph.D./higher degrees), teaching/research experience, publications and performance in interview, as per Jharkhand Medical Education Service Rules 2018.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for JPSC Assistant Professor Super Speciality Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹600 + bank charges for UR, BC‑I, BC‑II and EWS candidates, ₹150 + bank charges for SC/ST of Jharkhand, while PwD candidates (40% or above disability) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q9. How do I apply online for JPSC Assistant Professor (Super Speciality) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must complete One‑Time Registration (OTR) at jpsc.gov.in, log in, fill the Assistant Professor (Super Speciality) application form with all details, upload photo, signature and certificates, pay the fee online, then print and send the hard copy with self‑attested documents to JPSC, Ranchi by 25 May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Which documents are required at the time of JPSC Assistant Professor interview and verification?
faq.answer: Candidates must produce originals and self‑attested copies of Matric (DOB proof), MBBS degree and marksheets, D.M./M.Ch./DNB/DrNB certificates, teaching/research experience certificates, government service certificate (if any), publication proofs, Jharkhand domicile, caste/EWS/PwD certificates and NOC for in‑service candidates.
